name: monthly-report
description: Monthly SEO report on any stack — what changed, why it matters, and what to do next. Compares Month M vs M-1 with a 3-month trend, audits metadata across a live crawl or local source files, and outputs a prioritized action plan. GSC is the primary data source; degrades gracefully to crawl + baseline when GSC is absent. Read-only reporting, built for founders and executives.
